imageGenerator.aspectRatioHint: Selected aspect ratio: {{aspectRatio}}. This model doesn't support an explicit aspect ratio parameter, so we'll add it as a prompt hint.
imageGenerator.autoDeleteWarning: Important: Images are automatically deleted after 7 days. Please download and save them locally if you need to keep them.
imageGenerator.checkingPlanAccessDescription: We are verifying whether this workspace can use image generation.
imageGenerator.deleteConfirmHeader: Are you sure you want to delete this image?
imageGenerator.deleteConfirmText: This action cannot be undone. The image will be permanently deleted from storage.
imageGenerator.deleteFailedDescription: Failed to delete image from storage. Please try again.
imageGenerator.describeEdit: Describe how you want to edit the image, or generate a new one...
imageGenerator.describeImage: Describe the image you want to generate... (Press Enter to generate, Shift+Enter for new line)
imageGenerator.downloadFailedDescription: Failed to download image. Please try again.

restorePhoto4k.description: Faithfully restore old and damaged photos, while at the same time upscaling to 4K.

risographIcons.description: Generate a collection of risograph-style icons.

stickerMascot.description: Generate a clean sticker mascot you can customize by replacing [a theme].

stickerSheetIcons.description: Generate a themed icon sticker sheet. Replace [a theme] with your own theme.

tshirtHalftone.description: Generate a strict black/white halftone mask (matte) from an existing image at 2K.

upscale4k.description: Accurately upscale your low resolution images to 4K.

imageGenerator.fileTooLargeDescription: Please select an image smaller than 5MB
imageGenerator.imageSetForEditingDescription: Image has been set for editing in the AI image editing tool
imageGenerator.imageSizeHint: Selected image size: {{size}}. This model doesn't support an explicit image size parameter, so we'll add it as a prompt hint.
imageGenerator.invalidCustomSizeDescription: Use WIDTHxHEIGHT, multiples of 16, max 3840 per edge, ratio up to 3:1, and total pixels within GPT Image 2 limits.
imageGenerator.languageTranslation: Your prompts will be automatically translated to English for this model
imageGenerator.planDisabledDescription: AI image generation is available from the Starter plan.
imageGenerator.planDisabledTitle: Image generation is not available on this plan
imageGenerator.promptDropActive: Drop reference images to attach them
imageGenerator.promptDropHint: Tip: drag reference images onto the prompt area to attach them for compatible models.
imageGenerator.scrollToZoom: Scroll to zoom, drag to pan
imageGenerator.startGenerating: Start generating images by entering a prompt below
imageGenerator.unsupportedReferenceImageType: This file type is not supported as a reference image.
imageGenerator.waitForUploads: Please wait for all uploads to complete before generating images.
